{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "ProcessHerpaderping.exe is not a standard Windows binary. Its name suggests a known process masquerading technique. The command line explicitly mentions 'mimikatz.exe', a credential dumping tool. It writes 'wardog.exe' to disk and then executes it, and also modifies a BAM registry key.",
  "indicators": [
    "unknown binary",
    "herpaderping",
    "mimikatz",
    "write executable",
    "execute dropped file",
    "registry modification"
  ]
}
